Package space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc

package space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc
This package provides JDBC and SQL utilities for database operations, for example: 

 // Quickly create a connection pool to get a connection:
 SimpleJdbcPool pool = SimpleJdbcPool.newBuilder()
     .driverClassName(className)
     .url(url)
     .username(username)
     .password(password)
     .build();
 Connection connection = pool.getConnection();
 // Using SqlBuilder for fluent SQL construction:
 List<User> users = SqlBuilder.newBuilder()
     .append("SELECT * FROM `users` WHERE 1=1")
     .appendIf(searchEnabled, " AND name LIKE ", "%" + searchTerm + "%")
     .append(" ORDER BY created_at DESC")
     .build()
     .query(User.class, connection)
     .list();
 // Release (but not actually close) the connection pool:
 connection.close();
 // Close the connection pool, all connections in the pool will be closed:
 pool.close();
Core interfaces:
  • SimpleJdbcPool
  • SqlBuilder
  • PreparedSql
  • PreparedBatchSql
  • SqlQuery
  • SqlInsert
  • SqlUpdate
  • SqlOperation
  • SqlBatch
Utility classes:
  • JdbcKit
Runtime exceptions for SQL operations:
  • SqlRuntimeException
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    space.sunqian.fs.utils
    This package and its subpackages contain common non-core tools, including: space.sunqian.fs.utils.codec: For codec; space.sunqian.fs.utils.eventbus: Provides simple event-bus interfaces and implementations; space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc: Package for JDBC and SQL; space.sunqian.fs.utils.version: Semantic version; And a utilities kit for common operations: UtilKit.
    space.sunqian.fs.utils.codec
    Provides utilities for codec, including crypto, base64, hex, etc.
    space.sunqian.fs.utils.eventbus
    Provides simple event bus interface and default implementation: SimpleEventBus: Simple event bus interface;
    space.sunqian.fs.utils.version
    Provides classes and interfaces for semantic versioning.
  • Class
    Description
    JdbcKit
    Utilities for JDBC and SQL.
    PreparedBatchSql
    This interface represents a prepared SQL string for batch execution with the specified batch parameters to be bound.
    PreparedSql
    This interface represents a prepared SQL string with the specified parameters to be bound.
    SimpleJdbcPool
    Simple JDBC connection pool interface that provides methods for acquiring and releasing database connections.
    SimpleJdbcPool.Builder
    Builder class for SimpleJdbcPool.
    SimpleJdbcPool.ConnectionFactory
    Factory interface for creating database connections.
    SimpleJdbcPool.ConnectionWrapperFactory
    Factory interface for wrapping original database connection.
    SqlBatch
    This interface represents the batch operation of a list of SQL statements.
    SqlBuilder
    This interface is used for building SQL in method chaining.
    SqlInsert
    This interface represents the insert operation of a SQL statement.
    SqlOperation
    This interface represents the operation of a SQL statement.
    SqlQuery<T>
    This interface represents the query operation of a SQL statement.
    SqlRuntimeException
    This is the runtime version of SQLException.
    SqlUpdate
    This interface represents the update operation of a SQL statement.
